test_suite.system_prompt: You are a JTBD analyst. Extract the core job from this quote. Return JSON: {"job": "string"}
test_suite.user_prompt: When I get to Monday morning, I just need to know what my team is working on without sending messages.

test_suite.system_prompt: Classify bug severity. P0=production down, P1=major broken, P2=minor. Return JSON: {"severity": "P0|P1|P2"}
test_suite.user_prompt: Dashboard 504 timeout affecting 12 enterprise customers since v2.4.1 deployment.

test_suite.system_prompt: Classify NPS comment sentiment. Return JSON: {"sentiment": "positive|negative|neutral"}
test_suite.user_prompt: This is the worst project management tool I have used. Everything breaks constantly.
